detail: Reasoning-oriented India-to-EU apparel dataset with cleaned raw facts and deliberate evidence ambiguity.
All CSV files in agent_data are available to agents.
ground_truth_assessments.csv must never be exposed to agents or loaded by production tools.
No risk_profile, validation_note, agent_validation, decision_effect, expected_agent_message or precomputed evidence status.
Documents have metadata plus separately extracted raw fields. Presence does not imply sufficiency.
Agents must connect shipment, SKU, component, document, material, colour, batch, destination and stage.
Ordinary consumer apparel from India to Germany, Netherlands, France, Italy and Spain.
Synthetic business records; regulatory rows reference official EU sources but do not replace current professional review.
SHP-000001 contains a missing invoice, a blue garment, an old navy azo report without SKU/batch linkage, and label wording using Lycra.
